new_classes.definition_en: A quality borne by a non-alcoholic beverage that indicates the presence and proportion of fat derived from dairy products falling under CN headings 0401 to 0404 (milk, cream, buttermilk, whey, etc.).
A material entity consisting of refined vegetable fats or oils added to a skimmed-milk base to produce a filled-milk beverage, replacing the naturally occurring milk fat.

new_classes.label_en: Other Non-Alcoholic Beverage Containing Dairy Fat (CN 2202 99 91–99)
new_classes.definition_en: A non-alcoholic beverage, other than those of CN 2202 10 or 2202 99 11–51, that contains fat obtained from products of CN headings 0401 to 0404, including commercially designated 'filled milk' products that are ready for direct consumption as a beverage and consist of a skimmed-milk or powdered skimmed-milk base to which refined vegetable fats or oils have been added.

new_properties.label_en: has refined vegetable fat or oil

coverage_explanation: The axioms cover the three main distinguishing criteria for CN 2202 9999: (1) the beverage belongs to the residual "other non-alcoholic" category under heading 2202; (2) it contains fat derived from CN headings 0401–0404 (dairy-derived fat); and (3) ready-for-direct-consumption status (as required for the filled-milk inclusion). The special case of "filled milk" – a skimmed-milk/powdered-skimmed-milk base with refined vegetable fats or oils added – is modelled via the existing FilledMilkBeverage class (already in running TBox), extended with explicit part restrictions on SkimmedMilkBase and RefinedVegetableFatOrOil. Coverage is reduced to 0.72 because: (a) the precise quantitative fat-content thresholds that distinguish the sub-subheadings 91/95/99 within 2202 99 are not specified in the supplied legal note and therefore cannot be axiomatised; (b) the note is truncated and the full numerical ranges (e.g. "less than X % fat", "X % or more but less than Y %", "Y % or more") are missing, so the DairyFatContentQuality datatype range restrictions cannot be populated; (c) the complement axiom distinguishing 22029999 from 22029991 and 22029995 cannot be expressed without the missing threshold values.
